data.title: Investor Huang Licheng Leverages High Stakes in Cryptocurrency Market
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, investor Huang Licheng, also known as 'Machi Big Brother,' has taken significant positions in the cryptocurrency market using high leverage. He has employed a 40x leverage to go long on Bitcoin, holding 75 BTC valued at approximately $8.58 million, with an average entry price of $114,702.1 per Bitcoin. Additionally, he has utilized a 3x leverage to go long on YZY, holding 150,000 tokens worth $100,000, with an average entry price of $0.681 per token.

Huang Licheng also holds a long position of 16,100 ETH, valued at $76.78 million, with an average entry price of $4,645.32 per ETH, currently yielding an unrealized profit of $2.03 million. Furthermore, he has a long position of 136,000 HYPE tokens, valued at approximately $5.98 million, with an average entry price of $43.8 per token, currently showing an unrealized profit of $20,000. Overall, his long positions total $91.44 million in value.

data.title: Alleged NDA Ties Ripple, JPMorgan, and BlackRock to XRPL Identity Protocol
data.description:
An alleged leak from a former Swiss banker has ignited speculation about Ripple’s ambitions beyond payments. If authentic, the NDA suggests Ripple’s infrastructure is being positioned as more than a remittance tool. Ripple’s Alleged Blueprint for Identity-Linked Settlement Rails Using the alias Lord Belgrave, the anonymous ex-banker shared excerpts of a Mutual Non-Disclosure and Strategic Cooperation Agreement. It hints at a broader convergence of finance, digital identity, and compliance on the XRP Ledger (XRPL)
source: https://beincrypto.com/alleged-nda-ripple-jpmorgan-blackrock-xrpl/

data.title: Bond market runs on Fed cut bets but incoming data could shake things up
data.description:
U. S. government bonds went up Friday after Fed Chair Jerome Powell said the central bank might cut interest rates as soon as next month. But with important inflation and jobs data still to come, markets could shift again before the Fed’s September 17 meeting. Powell pointed to ending the eight-month pause in easing, saying labor-market […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bond-market-runs-on-fed-cut-bets/

data.title: Ethereum adds $23 billion in a day as ETH explodes to ATH: Here’s path to $10k
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH) is trading at a new all-time high as the second-ranked cryptocurrency by market cap continues to record a surge in capital inflow that has grown over $20 billion in the past day.  Specifically, the asset recorded an inflow of $23.61 billion to its market cap in the past 24 hours, rising from $573.50 billion to $597
source: https://finbold.com/ethereum-adds-23-billion-in-a-day-as-eth-explodes-to-ath-heres-path-to-10k/

data.title: Stargate DAO approves LayerZero acquisition, despite last-minute interest from Wormhole, Axelar, and Across
data.description:

source: https://www.theblock.co/post/368040/stargate-dao-approves-layerzero-acquisition-despite-last-minute-interest-from-wormhole-axelar-and-across?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
